string.text: Affects damage and survivability of the player, mutants and stalkers.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Stalker"

Responsible for the mechanics of breath holding in scopes.
 
The key must be assigned in the control options.
 
Default: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
The effect of bullets flying nearby.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Automatic saving during transitions between locations.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Display tracers on bullets that have them.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Physical handling of player collisions with the bodies of mutants and stalkers.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Player"
Allows you to pick up several items from the ground at once, lying at a certain distance from the player.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Display of wound marks on the bodies of mutants and stalkers.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Displays the status of the game in your Discord profile.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Includes character recognition: name, grouping, and relation to the player (when aiming at a character, if enabled).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Displays the crosshairs of the scope.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Switches the scope to dynamic mode (the crosshairs will change size depending on the player's actions).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
First-person display of hand models, weapons, and items.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Shows the distance to the target or object at which the crosshairs are pointed.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Refreshes inventory cells if you pick up or relocate items from corpses or crates.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Allows you to select the behavior of the crosshair.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Standard"
Allows you to select the type of crosshair.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Compact"
Displays basic information for the player (minimap, quick slots, ammo count and main character status information).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Displays various debugging information about the gameplay (for modmakers only).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Позволяет выбрать нужный вам язык (во время игрового процесса сменить язык нельзя).
Allows you to select the language you want (you cannot change the language during gameplay).
Displays artifact slots and information about current partners (on the main screen).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
The effect of negative influences on the player.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
The effect of bleeding or low health.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Displays the amount of health the current opponent has.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Over time, dropped items are removed from the world.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Includes playing music on the radio at specific locations in the game world.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
This option is responsible for the repair time of items (repair is not instantaneous and directly depends on the condition of the item).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
The sound of helicopter blades.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Responsible for the appearance of helicopters in the Zone.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Displays messages about any news in the Zone.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Over time, found artifacts will lose their properties if they are hung on a belt and used in any way (such as protecting the wearer from harmful effects).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Mutant population ratio in Zone.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"0.5"
Stalker population ratio in the Zone.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"0.5"
The distance at which the spamming of mutants and other stalkers in dangerous proximity to the player is prevented.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"50"
The number of quick saves a player can make.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"5"
An initial portrait of the protagonist.
Changes the original portrait accordingly to your character's current outfit.\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"

Includes simulation of life (A-life) throughout the Zone, not just in locations that are connected to the one where the player is at the moment (after enabling this option, the simulation of life becomes extremely unpredictable, strange or incorrect).
 
The changes will take effect after restarting the game or moving to another location.
 
Default: %c[255,216,186,140]"Disabled"
Disables the PDA screen if an "Emission" or "Psi-storm" begins (the screen will show errors and disturbances).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
Disables the PDA screen if the player is in underground locations (the screen will show errors and disturbances).\n \nDefault: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"

Activates the ability to fast travel around via PDA using special icons (green house) that open as you explore game locations.
 
The changes will take effect after: restarting the game, restarting the level or moving to another location.
 
Default: %c[255,216,186,140]"Enabled"
